title: Benchmark updates its best ideas list
content:
[Close Up Image Of A Stock Market Graph]
solarseven/iStock via Getty Images

Benchmark Equity Research on Tuesday released its quarterly update to the firm’s “best ideas” list, featuring 29 high-conviction, catalyst-driven stock picks selected by the company’s analysts.

The April 2026 refresh includes three notable additions to the list: IMAX Corp. (IMAX [https://seekingalpha.com/symbol/IMAX]), CrowdStrike Holdings (CRWD [https://seekingalpha.com/symbol/CRWD]), and Lifeway Foods (LWAY [https://seekingalpha.com/symbol/LWAY]). Vital Farms (VITL [https://seekingalpha.com/symbol/VITL]) was removed from the list.

The complete best ideas list, grouped by sector:

CONSUMER

 	*
Driven Brands Holdings (DRVN [https://seekingalpha.com/symbol/DRVN])

 	*
Patrick Industries (PATK [https://seekingalpha.com/symbol/PATK])
